name: qr-order-system
description: 扫码点餐系统 - TypeScript 全栈 + WebSocket 实时 + AI 推荐

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "cd server && npm run dev" "cd web && npm run dev"
scripts.db:setup: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev --name init && npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:reset: cd server && npx prisma migrate reset --force
